description: Creates a visible line from edge data extracted from a polygon or triangle. Supports segment (finite), line (infinite), and ray (half-infinite) rendering modes, with optional color and dash styling.
utility: Draw visible line from polygon edge extraction

arguments.name: edge_data
arguments.description: Edge data extracted from polygon using item()

arguments.name: lineType
arguments.description: Type of line: segment (default), line (infinite), ray

examples.scenario: Create triangle and extract all edges
Draw edge c (first edge) in blue
examples.expression: line_c = line(graph_1, item(triangle_1, type(edge), 1), type(segment), c(blue))

examples.scenario: Draw edge a (second edge) in blue
examples.expression: line_a = line(graph_1, item(triangle_1, type(edge), 2), type(segment), c(blue))

examples.scenario: Draw edge b (third edge) in blue
examples.expression: line_b = line(graph_1, item(triangle_1, type(edge), 3), type(segment), c(blue))

examples.scenario: Highlight base edge with thick stroke
Draw height as dashed red line
examples.expression: line_height = line(graph_1, point_c, point_projected_d, type(segment), dash(), c(red))
